title: Revolve Group Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: Revolve Group's first quarter 2026 results showcase the company's strong execution in a dynamic operating environment. Net sales increased 16% year-over-year to $342.9 million, driven by a combination of traffic growth and improved conversion. Earnings per share of $0.20 grew 25% year-over-year, demonstrating operating leverage and margin expansion. Active customers grew 8% to 2.926 million, reflecting strong customer acquisition and retention. The company's strategic initiatives, including the launch of REVOLVE Los Angeles and the Cardi B beauty partnership, are gaining traction and generating meaningful brand awareness and customer engagement. Management expects double-digit revenue growth for full year 2026, with margin guidance of 53.5% to 54.0%, representing stability compared to prior periods. The company's debt-free balance sheet, with $336 million in cash, provides significant flexibility for retail expansion and brand investments. The successful opening of flagship locations and planned Miami retail location demonstrates management's confidence in the physical retail opportunity and omnichannel strategy.
